Tim Cook to become Apple Executive Chairman John Ternus to become Apple CEO
content: Apple announced Tim Cook will become executive chairman of Apple’s board of directors and John Ternus will become Apple’s next CEO.

title: Johny Srouji named Apple’s Chief Hardware Officer
content: Apple today announced that, effective immediately, Apple executive Johny Srouji will become chief hardware officer.

title: Apple accelerates progress with highest-ever recycled material in its products
content: Apple today announced that a record 30 percent of material across all of its products shipped in 2025 came from recycled content.

title: Apple Arcade brings endless family fun with Nick Jr. Replay! on May 7
content: This May, Apple Arcade is rolling out the red carpet for some of the world’s most iconic and celebrated characters in its family-friendly lineup of fun games.

title: Apple adds new partners to its American Manufacturing Program
content: Apple announced new members of its American Manufacturing Program, expanding the company’s commitment to bring more advanced manufacturing to the U.S.

title: Introducing Apple Business — a new all-in-one platform for businesses of all sizes
content: Apple today announced Apple Business, a new all-in-one platform that allows companies to manage devices and reach more customers.

title: Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference returns the week of June 8
content: Apple today announced it will host its annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) online from June 8-12.

title: Apple introduces AirPods Max 2
content: Apple announced AirPods Max 2, bringing even better ANC, elevated sound quality, and intelligent features to the iconic over-ear design.

title: Apple hosts 50th anniversary celebrations around the world
content: Apple commemorated its 50th anniversary with celebrations around the world, featuring artists like Alicia Keys and Paul McCartney.

title: Apple to celebrate 50 years of thinking different
content: Apple today announced it will mark its 50th anniversary, celebrating five decades of thinking different and the innovations that helped shape the world.

title: “Friday Night Baseball” returns to Apple TV on March 27 for its fifth season
content: “Friday Night Baseball” — a weekly MLB doubleheader on Apple TV — returns for its fifth season on March 27.

title: Apple Arcade adds DREDGE+ and Unpacking+ to its catalog in April
content: Apple Arcade adds award-winning games DREDGE+ and Unpacking+ to its catalog in April, plus a Star Wars update to Disney SpellStruck.

title: MacBook Neo, iPhone 17e, iPad Air with M4, and more are now available
content: Customers can now shop for MacBook Neo, iPhone 17e, MacBook Air with M5, MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max, iPad Air with M4, and two new displays.

title: Formula 1® begins this weekend, exclusively on Apple TV in the U.S.
content: The 2026 FIA Formula One World Championship™ begins this weekend on Apple TV with the FORMULA 1 QATAR AIRWAYS AUSTRALIAN GRAND PRIX 2026.

title: Say hello to MacBook Neo
content: Apple today unveiled MacBook Neo, an all-new laptop that delivers the magic of the Mac at a breakthrough price.

title: Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5
content: Apple today announced the new MacBook Air with M5, bringing exceptional performance and expanded AI capabilities to the world’s most popular laptop.

title: Apple introduces MacBook Pro with all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max
content: Apple announced the latest 14- and 16-inch MacBook Pro with the all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max.

title: Apple debuts M5 Pro and M5 Max to supercharge the most demanding pro workflows
content: Apple today announced M5 Pro and M5 Max, the world’s most advanced chips for pro laptops, powering the new MacBook Pro.

title: Apple unveils new Studio Display and all-new Studio Display XDR
content: Apple today announced a new family of displays, Studio Display and Studio Display XDR, that takes pro workflows to the next level.

title: Apple introduces iPhone 17e
content: Apple today announced the new iPhone 17e, a powerful and affordable addition to the iPhone 17 lineup.

REDMOND, Wash. — March 17, 2025 — Microsoft Corp. has received notice of an unsolicited “mini-tender” offer by TRC Capital Investment Corporation (TRC) dated Feb.21, 2025, to purchase up to 300,000 shares of Microsoft’s common stock at a price of $391.00 per share in cash. The offer represents less than 0.01% of Microsoft’s outstanding common […]

title: Microsoft announces quarterly dividend
content:
REDMOND, Wash. — March 11, 2025 — Microsoft Corp. on Tuesday announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.83 per share.
